# <Feature/Module> — Design Spec

**Status:** Proposed | Accepted | Implemented
**Objective:** One sentence — what this buys.
**Android source:** `android/...` — the Kotlin module(s) this ports.
**Hard invariants:** What must never break (behavior parity, data integrity,
App Store compliance).

## Context

Why now. What forces this design. How the Android original behaves
(grounded in the actual source, with `path:line` references).

## Design

How the iOS version works. Diagrams welcome. Where it deliberately diverges
from the Android original, say so and why.

## Decisions settled here

- Decision — rationale. (Promote load-bearing ones to `docs/decisions/`.)

## Alternatives rejected

- Alt — why not.

## Open questions

- Item.

---
Pair this with an implementation plan: `docs/plans/<same-slug>.md`.
